theme_notes: Drawn from the WHO's Ebola global health emergency declaration, Russia's record 524-drone-and-22-missile overnight barrage on Ukraine, Trump's disclosed $220M–$750M in Q1 stock trades (including Nvidia bought days before greenlighting chip sales to China), and the NBA Conference Finals kicking off tonight (Spurs vs. Thunder, Cavaliers vs. Knicks).
settled: The WHO declared Ebola an emergency. You two declared a wash. Impressive restraint.
Balanced. Unlike the US, the Middle East, or anyone's Thursday.
Russia fired 524 drones last night. You're somehow the most stable thing on earth.
youOwe: Less than Trump's Nvidia trade rounds down to. Which is saying something.
Ebola is a global health emergency. This is a $40 problem. Stay humble.
You owe enough to buy a drone. A very bad drone. In a market flooded with them.
Russia cleared this in missile fuel per missile. You have one missile.
That's 0.00003% of Trump's Q1 portfolio. The gap is not closing.
The WHO escalated an Ebola outbreak faster than you'll square this up.
A Spurs floor seat costs more. You'd buy the floor seat. You always do.
Iran-US ceasefire talks have a better shot at resolving. Just so you know.
You're one missed payment from being a geopolitical incident.
Iran wants reparations. You just want a Venmo. Somehow you're the unreasonable one.
Trump made this in Nvidia stock while asleep. You are awake. You still owe.
The WHO would escalate to Phase 2 at this point. So would we.
Trump disclosed this as a rounding error. For you it's a Slack conversation.
Ukraine held off 524 drones. You can't hold off a payment reminder.
The Ebola outbreak is serious. Your finances are also serious. One is curable.
Russia's single-night drone budget. You're living like a state actor.
Trump pocketed this before lunch on Nvidia. You haven't had breakfast.
Iran wants war reparations. You owe dinner reparations. Both are going nowhere.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a WHO field report costs to print. Still on the record.
Small. Quiet. Growing. Like an outbreak they said was contained.
Even the UAE nuclear plant has a backup plan. You have a memory.
Russia cleared eight target regions overnight. They've cleared zero invoices.
The Spurs are in the Conference Finals. Their repayment is still in round one.
They'll pay when there's peace in the Middle East. Plan accordingly.
Deadlocked. Like the ceasefire. Like your Venmo request from six weeks ago.
Ukraine rebuilt faster than they've started a conversation about this.
You could fund a Knicks-Cavs road trip or wait for this. Same uncertainty.
Trump bought Nvidia with this. They bought time. Guess which appreciated.
The WHO moves in 72 hours. It's been three months. They are not the WHO.
Russia hit eight regions and gave more notice than your roommate.
At this level they should file a financial disclosure. You'd read every word.
Iran demanded war reparations. You want Venmo. Same energy. Smaller stage.
America just lost its top credit rating. So have they. With you.
Russia launched 22 ballistic missiles last night. You've sent 22 unanswered requests.
Trump made this before breakfast on Nvidia. They haven't paid since last year.
This is a geopolitical debt now. Request a mediator. Try Geneva.
